blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt: 90 minutes from Champions League immortality
A 3-1 first-leg lead in hand. San Siro tomorrow night. Norway's greatest-ever Champions League moment is 24 hours away — Bodo/Glimt need only hold their nerve against Inter.
⚽ Mon 21:00 — Everton vs Manchester United, PL — United (5th) sleepwalk through a forgettable Monday.
